samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Frequency divider for generating 50MHz, 10MHz, and 1MHz clocks from a 100MHz input clock.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal (100MHz).</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal (50MHz).</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal (10MHz).</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal (1MHz).</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Counter for 50MHz
        reg [31:0] cnt_50;
        always @(posedge CLK_in or negedge RST) begin
            if (!RST) begin
                cnt_50 <= 0;
            end else begin
                cnt_50 <= cnt_50 + 1;
            end
        end
        
        // Counter for 10MHz
        reg [31:0] cnt_10;
        always @(posedge CLK_in or negedge RST) begin
            if (!RST) begin
                cnt_10 <= 0;
            end else begin
                if (cnt_10 == 4) begin
                    cnt_10 <= 0;
                end else begin
                    cnt_10 <= cnt_10 + 1;
                end
            end
        end
        
        // Counter for 1MHz
        reg [31:0] cnt_1;
        always @(posedge CLK_in or negedge RST) begin
            if (!RST) begin
                cnt_1 <= 0;
            end else begin
                if (cnt_1 == 49) begin
                    cnt_1 <= 0;
                end else begin
                    cnt_1 <= cnt_1 + 1;
                end
            end
        end
        
        // Generate 50MHz clock
        reg CLK_50_reg;
        always @(posedge CLK_in or negedge RST) begin
            if (!RST) begin
                CLK_50_reg <= 0;
            end else begin
                CLK_50_reg <= ~CLK_50_reg;
            end
        end
        
        // Generate 10MHz clock
        reg CLK_10_reg;
        always @(posedge CLK_in or negedge RST) begin
            if (!RST) begin
                CLK_10_reg <= 0;
            end else begin
                if (cnt_10 == 4) begin
                    CLK_10_reg <= ~CLK_10_reg;
                end
            end
        end
        
        // Generate 1MHz clock
        reg CLK_1_reg;
        always @(posedge CLK_in or negedge RST) begin
            if (!RST) begin
                CLK_1_reg <= 0;
            end else begin
                if (cnt_1 == 49) begin
                    CLK_1_reg <= ~CLK_1_reg;
                end
            end
        end
        
        // Assign outputs
        assign CLK_50 = CLK_50_reg;
        assign CLK_10 = CLK_10_reg;
        assign CLK_1 = CLK_1_reg;
    </implementation>
</module>
